title: Assistant Store Manager - Nykaa Retail - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Nykaa Retail - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Assistant Store Manager with drive and ambition, Nykaa Retail in Gurgaon is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Nykaa Retail:
Nykaa Retail is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in CRM

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nykaa Retail!
